title: Dark Speculation Lab
subtitle: The Internet's Deepest Conspiracy Motifs — Classified, Not Confirmed
boundary: This page tracks dark claims, myths, occult motifs, public-record-adjacent allegations, and internet speculation. It does not present these claims as fact. Names, symbols, rumours, search results, photos, and associations are not proof. Use the claim classifier before belief.

weeklyScan.method: Wide query and feed matching against configured source lanes, live-intel, public-record routes, and claim motif keywords. No system can honestly scan the entire internet.

claims.title: Elite child sacrifice networks
claims.label: unsupported extreme allegation
claims.boundary: Do not treat rumour, symbol, or association as evidence of child harm.

claims.title: Elites eating children
claims.label: internet mythology
claims.boundary: Extreme internet horror motif unless case-specific evidence exists.

claims.title: Adrenochrome harvesting
claims.label: unsupported extreme allegation
claims.boundary: Track the claim history; do not present harvesting claims as fact.

claims.title: Red shoes made from children's skin
claims.label: symbolic/occult speculation
claims.boundary: A colour, shoe, or fashion symbol is not evidence of a crime.

claims.title: Blackmail islands and elite compromise networks
claims.label: public-record-adjacent
claims.boundary: Separate documented abuse networks from unsupported claims about specific people.

claims.title: Underground abuse facilities
claims.label: case-specific evidence required
claims.boundary: Requires physical evidence, records, official documents, or credible case reporting.

claims.title: Elites worship Moloch
claims.label: symbolic/occult speculation
claims.boundary: A ritual reference is not proof of literal worship or crime.

claims.title: Elites worship Baal
claims.label: symbolic/occult speculation
claims.boundary: Do not convert ancient-name symbolism into factual accusation.

claims.title: Saturn worship / black cube control system
claims.label: internet mythology
claims.boundary: Classify as symbolic or metaphysical unless a source supports a concrete claim.

claims.title: Demonic possession of elites
claims.label: paranormal claim
claims.boundary: Metaphysical claims cannot be verified like public records.

claims.title: Archons / loosh harvesting
claims.label: paranormal claim
claims.boundary: Track as spiritual mythology or metaphysical speculation.

claims.title: Reptilian elite bloodlines

claims.title: Grey aliens controlling governments

claims.boundary: Official UAP material does not prove alien political control.

claims.boundary: UFO folklore unless source evidence is produced.

claims.title: Secret space program

claims.title: Antarctica hidden civilization / sealed zone
claims.label: internet mythology
claims.boundary: Treat restricted access separately from hidden-civilization claims.

claims.title: MKUltra never ended
claims.label: public-record-adjacent

claims.title: Monarch programming

claims.title: Predictive programming

claims.title: Social media as behavioural control grid

claims.title: Fake messiah hologram event

claims.title: Staged UFO disclosure as control event

claims.title: Modern slavery hidden in supply chains

claims.title: Debt slavery / migrant labour exploitation
